metadata.description: Plugins shipped alongside clagentic-lite. Installs the four AI role agents (builder, reviewer, auditor, merge-gate) globally so Claude Code discovers them in any enrolled project.

plugins.name: clagentic-lite-agents
plugins.description: The four clagentic-lite role agents: builder (primary code author), reviewer (cross-vendor code review), auditor (security gates), merge-gate (final pre-merge sanity check).
